# GUIDELINES

item.text: The focused suite matches the provided CI result locally: 63 passed, 0 failed. I’m submitting the review artifact with the added regression test and no blockers.

arguments.summary_title: Kubernetes-safe dashed gear env override is covered and passing
arguments.summary_markdown:
Reviewed the implementation in `libs/toolkit/src/bootstrap/config/mod.rs`. The fix adds post-extraction reconciliation for Kubernetes-safe underscore aliases of dashed gear names, deep-merging the alias value into the dashed gear entry while preserving explicit underscore-named gears.

Tests added/modified: `libs/toolkit/src/bootstrap/config/mod.rs` now includes `test_env_override_uses_kubernetes_safe_name_for_dashed_gear`, which reproduces the original failure with `static-authz-plugin` and `APP__GEARS__STATIC_AUTHZ_PLUGIN__CONFIG__PRIORITY=50`. It also includes an underscore-named gear control (`static_authz_control`) to confirm existing underscore behavior still works.

Tests run: `cargo test -p cf-gears-toolkit --features bootstrap --lib bootstrap::config`. The suite passed locally and matches the supplied CI log: 63 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored, 252 filtered out. The bug reproduction now passes and no regressions appeared in the focused config test suite.

Blockers: none.
